{{Quote|We can break their spirit.|Wyrpuuk Cha|<ref name="Rebel Dream" />}}
'''Wyrpuuk Cha''' was a member of the [[warrior caste]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]], who held the [[Military rank/Legends|rank]] of [[Commander/Legends|commander]] during his [[Species/Legends|species']] [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invasion]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. During the Yuuzhan Vong War, when [[Fleet Group Three|elements]] of the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Force]] [[Battle of Borleias (Yuuzhan Vong War; Second)|retook]] [[Borleias/Legends|Borleias]] from the Yuuzhan Vong, Cha was chosen by [[Warmaster]] [[Tsavong Lah]] to assault the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] with his [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] and drive the New Republic from the [[Pyria system]].

Upon its arrival in the [[Star system/Legends|system]], Cha's fleet entered into an engagement with the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] forces, and planned to set up a staging point on the planet of [[Pyria VI]] before attacking Borleias itself. Before Cha could begin to withdraw, however, the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought]] ''[[Lusankya/Legends|Lusankya]]'' arrived in the midst of his fleet, and the commander was [[Death/Legends|killed]] when the colossal [[Warship/Legends|warship]] opened fire on his [[matalok]] [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]].

==Biography==
===Domain Cha commander===
{{Quote|Send Wyrpuuk Cha's fleet to crush them.|Tsavong Lah|<ref name="Rebel Dream" />}}
A [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Commander/Legends|commander]] from a [[Koros-Strohna]], Wyrpuuk Cha led a sizeable [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], which he directed from his [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], a [[matalok]] [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]]. Following the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|capture]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] at the hands of [[Warmaster]] [[Tsavong Lah]], the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Fleet Group Three|defenders]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] were routed and set up a defense on the world of [[Borleias/Legends|Borleias]], [[Battle of Borleias (Yuuzhan Vong War; Second)|forcing]] [[Domain Kraal]], the Yuuzhan Vong [[domain]] that had been guarding over the planet, into hiding.<ref name="Rebel Dream" />

[[File:LucyAgainstTheDiamondsInTheSky.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Wyrpuuk Cha participated in the Battle of Borleias.]]
As domains Kraal and [[Domain Cha|Cha]] were rivals, Warmaster Lah dispatched Wyrpuuk Cha to Borleias at the [[Commanding officer/Legends|head]] of his fleet<ref name="Rebel Dream" /> in [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]]<ref name="Date" /> in order to retake the planet and humiliate the Kraal for having lost territory to the New Republic. Cha, although a relatively experienced [[Warrior caste|warrior]], was eager to demonstrate his worth to the warmaster, and thus he entered the [[Pyria system]] intending a quick victory.<ref name="Rebel Dream" />

He was taken off guard by the fact that Borleias seemed to lack adequate defenses. Present in Cha's fleet were two [[yammosk]]s, creatures used by the [[Yuuzhan Vong empire]] to coordinate forces and provide information on the enemy, but due to the Pyria system possessing a large number of [[Gravity well/Legends|gravity wells]], the gravitic signals used by the yammosks to communicate with the commander were nullified, and thus Cha was unable to attain sufficient data on the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic forces]].<ref name="Rebel Dream" />

===Defeat at Borleias===
{{Quote|The infidels demonstrated unusual precision, daring, and savagery in a brilliantly conceived and executed plan. They dropped their largest spacecraft, one that we did not know was part of the fleet there, into the heart of Wyrpuuk Cha's formation and used it to destroy both yammosks.|Tsavong Lah|<ref name="Rebel Dream" />}}
Forced instead to rely solely on [[Blaze bug/Legends|blaze bugs]], [[Insectoid/Legends|insectoid]] creatures that created a visual representation of the immediate battleground, Cha was limited in what he could perceive. The commander became intrigued by the fact that the visible New Republic [[Starship/Legends|starships]] present had congregated over a single point on Borleias's surface, and seemed to have an interest in the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Pyria VI]], in the form of a small outpost. Cha assumed that Borleias and its moon were the focus of a secret New Republic interest; thus his first action was to send forth probing [[yorik-et]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]] to reconnoiter the [[Star system/Legends|system]].<ref name="Rebel Dream" />

[[File:Lusankya-CE5.png|thumb|right|250px|Wyrpuuk Cha was defeated due to the arrival of the ''Lusankya''.]]
Cha's intention was to leave his [[Command ship/Legends|command vessel]] open for attack, luring the New Republic forces in before wiping them out with clinical efficiency. While he waited for this to occur, he sent a force of yorik-et to attack the installation on Pyria 6, and a [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]] with its [[Starfighter/Legends|fighters]] to probe Borleias' defenses. Although Cha's forces overran the outpost on the outer planet, they experienced losses at Borleias itself. The commander decided to concentrate on Pyria VI and use it as a staging area, breaking off the failing assault on Borleias. His tactical musings, however, were interrupted by the arrival of a New Republic [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought]], the ''[[Lusankya/Legends|Lusankya]]'', which reverted from [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] in the midst of his fleet.<ref name="Rebel Dream" />

The mighty [[Warship/Legends|warship]] overwhelmed Cha's cruiser instantly, devastating the vessel with a crippling [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] and [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannon]] barrage. Cha was in the process of giving the order to retreat when the [[Bridge (starship)/Legends|bridge]] of the matalok was hit. A huge breach opened in the [[Hull/Legends|hull]], and he was sucked out to his [[Death/Legends|death]] in the [[Vacuum/Legends|vacuum]] of [[Realspace/Legends|space]]. In his absence, the rest of his fleet descended upon the ''Lusankya'', only to be destroyed and routed by the combined forces of the [[Star Dreadnought/Legends|Star Dreadnought]] and the New Republic [[Battle group/Legends|battle groups]] that had been hidden throughout the system.<ref name="Rebel Dream" />

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|We were hoping to get a Yuuzhan Vong commander of average skills, with an average fleet, and I suspect that we did.|Wedge Antilles, discussing his defeat of Wyrpuuk Cha|<ref name="Rebel Dream" />}}
Wyrpuuk Cha was keen to prove himself in the [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] of his superiors, as such he was cautious and unwilling to commit his forces to a battle that he might lose. A capable tactician, Cha comported himself as such; he did not show any doubts in front of his subordinates. Although the arrival of the ''Lusankya'' was entirely beyond his control, Cha was by no means a master strategist, as he was lured in by the apparent significance of Pyria 6 and of the congregation of ships in [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] over Borleias, both of which were decoys created by the New Republic commander, [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]].<ref name="Rebel Dream" />

==Behind the scenes==
Wyrpuuk Cha first appeared in the [[2002]] novel ''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines I: Rebel Dream]]'', which was written by [[Aaron Allston]].<ref name="Rebel Dream" />
